questionHtml: The voltage output from the generator is stepped up before transmission to the consumer. Estimate the factor by which voltage has to be stepped up in order to reduce power loss in the transmission line by a factor of 2.5×102.
markschemeHtml: «power loss proportional to I2 hence the step-up factor is 2.5×102» 16 ✓
